ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email of the regional health administration contact */,
  "admin_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the regional health administration contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric (e.g., Active Cases, Recoveries) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., Count, Rate) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "is_cumulative" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the metric is cumulative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Local Health Department) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the source's website or data portal */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last date when the source provided data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the person who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the record was updated */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, health analyst) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for security purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Username of the person who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report that the visualization is based on */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visual_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for visualization */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL to the visualization if hosted externally */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health data record being checked */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* Username of the person who performed the check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the check */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the check result (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug report, feature request, general) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "submitted_on" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., login, data update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
